scripts.db:reset: docker exec lime_postgres psql -U postgres -c "SELECT pg_terminate_backend(pid) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = 'lime_postgres' AND pid <> pg_backend_pid();" && docker exec lime_postgres psql -U postgres -c 'DROP DATABASE chat_db;' && docker exec lime_postgres psql -U postgres -c 'CREATE DATABASE chat_db;' && bun run migrate:up && bun run seed
